params.data: Calldata of the call made to target
params.useEth: Specifies if Eth is being sent to the target

returns._0: canCall Specifies if the interaction is accepted
returns._1: tokensIn List of tokens that the account will receive after the interactions
returns._2: tokensOut List of tokens that will be removed from the account after the interaction

canCall(address,bool,bytes).notice: General function that evaluates whether the target contract can be interacted with using the specified calldata
